case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. OSUALDO GARIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED APR-21-2015, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF NICHOLE SANTIAGO IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARIN, OSUALDO GARIN, CITALY RODRIGUEZ, LOTHAR RODRIGUEZ, JONATHAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 861 INNES AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124; COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, ***INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT*** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
